nasb.text: and for all the mighty power and for all the great terror which Moses performed in the sight of all Israel.

esv.text: and for all the mighty power and all the great deeds of terror that Moses did in the sight of all Israel.

cnv.text: 摩西又在以色列眾人眼前行了一切大能的事，和一切大而可畏的事。

ccb.text: 在以色列人面前行伟大而可畏的事。
